blockRolesDescription: Give selected blocks a reusable semantic role.
blockRolesUsage: Open a block menu, choose Stillmark Workbench, then select a role.
dailyNotesAutoCreateDescription: Silently create today's note when SiYuan starts without opening it.
dailyNotesAutoCreateFailed: Failed to create today's note on startup
dailyNotesButtonTitle: Open today's note; right-click or long-press for the last 7 days
dailyNotesCreateFailed: Failed to create or open the daily note
dailyNotesCurrentPageUnavailable: No document page is currently available
dailyNotesCurrentPathUnsupported: The current native daily-note path is ${path}. Enter a root directory to replace it with the fixed year/month/date structure.
dailyNotesHistoryFailed: Failed to load notes from the last 7 days
dailyNotesNotebookDescription: Daily notes are created only in the selected open notebook.
dailyNotesNotebookUnavailable: The configured notebook is closed or no longer exists. Configure it again.
dailyNotesOpenFailed: Failed to open the daily note
dailyNotesRootDescription: For example, /Journal. Notes are stored under year/month/YYYY-MM-DD.
dailyNotesRootInvalid: The root path cannot contain empty levels or ..
dailyNotesRootMustStartSlash: The root path must start with /
dailyNotesRootRequired: The root path cannot be empty or the root directory /
dailyNotesRootTemplateForbidden: The root path cannot contain Sprig template expressions
dailyNotesSettingsLoadFailed: Failed to load daily note settings
dailyNotesSettingsPartialFailure: Part of the SiYuan configuration changed, but plugin storage or readback failed
dailyNotesSettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save daily note settings
dailyNotesSettingsStillLoading: Settings are still loading. Try again in a moment.
dailyNotesTemplateConfigChanged: The notebook's native template setting changed. Save the plugin settings again.
dailyNotesTemplateDescription: Open a template page and choose Use current page, or use a file under data/templates. Choose one source; it applies only on first creation.
dailyNotesTemplateInvalid: The template path cannot contain empty levels or ..
dailyNotesTemplateMustBeRelative: The template path must be relative to data/templates
dailyNotesTemplatePageUnavailable: The template page no longer exists. Select it again.
dailyNotesTemplateSelectFailed: Failed to select the template page
dailyNotesTemplateSnapshotFailed: Failed to refresh the page template snapshot
dailyNotesToolDescription: Choose the notebook, journal directory, template, and startup behavior.
documentFindToolDescription: Press Command + F in the document editor (Ctrl + F on Windows/Linux) to find and highlight matches in the current document.
documentBreadcrumbLoadFailed: Failed to load the current note path
documentBreadcrumbSaveFailed: Failed to save breadcrumb navigation setting
documentBreadcrumbToolDescription: Show the notebook and parent-document path above the note title, with direct navigation to parent documents.
documentTreeAutoFocusDescription: Expand and select the current note in the document tree after opening or switching to it.
documentTreeAutoFocusSaveFailed: Failed to save automatic document-tree location
documentTreeAutoFocusVerificationFailed: Automatic document-tree location readback did not match
documentTreeFocusButtonTitle: Locate the current note in the document tree; right-click to configure automatic location
documentTreeFocusToolDescription: Locate the current note manually or automatically after opening it.
documentTreeFocusUnavailable: No note is available to locate in the document tree
fontSwitcherButtonTitle: Quickly adjust the editor font and size
fontSwitcherInvalidResponse: SiYuan returned an invalid font list
fontSwitcherSizeSwitchFailed: Failed to change the font size
fontSwitcherSizeVerificationFailed: Font-size setting readback did not match
fontSwitcherToolDescription: Adjust the font size, search system fonts with live previews, or restore defaults.
fontSwitcherVerificationFailed: Font setting readback did not match
inlineBacklinksSaveFailed: Failed to save linked pages display setting
inlineBacklinksToolDescription: Show pages that link to the current document and their context below the body.
pdfExportButtonTitle: Typeset and export the current document as PDF
pdfExportChoosingLocation: Choose where to save the PDF
pdfExportCopied: PDF file copied and ready to paste
pdfExportCopyUnavailable: Copying a PDF file currently requires SiYuan Desktop on macOS
pdfExportDirectUnavailable: Direct PDF saving is available only in the SiYuan desktop app
pdfExportNoDocument: Open the document you want to export first
pdfExportPrintHint: H1-H3 headings appear in the PDF reader's sidebar outline by default, not in the document body. Copy the PDF file directly or save it to the selected folder.
pdfExportSettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save PDF export settings
pdfExportToolDescription: Preview the current document and choose a restrained layout, paper size, and margins.
workbenchPreferenceSaveFailed: Failed to save workbench display settings
workbenchPreferenceVerificationFailed: Workbench display settings readback did not match
